description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male warrior figure holding a long spear in his right hand. The figure is muscular and dressed in what appears to be traditional attire, including pants and a headpiece with a feather or plume. The left arm is bent at the elbow, and the right leg is slightly forward, giving a sense of movement or readiness. The facial features and body musculature are well-defined, and the spear is detailed with feather-like decorations near the tip. The surface of the sculpture appears to be dark and matte, suggesting it is made of bronze or a similar metal. The overall posture and attire evoke a sense of historical or cultural significance.
description: A dark, matte sculpture of a standing male warrior holding a spear, adorned with a feathered headpiece and traditional attire.
description_view_0: Front view showing the warrior's chest, facial features, and the spear held diagonally across the body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the feathered headpiece, and the full length of the spear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the muscular back, the back of the headpiece, and the spear extending behind the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm and hand gripping the spear, as well as the side profile of the legs and head.
attribute_subject_matter: human warrior figure holding a spear
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is plain and does not indicate a specific setting.
